rulings.Case Title: MELVIN DESIN VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Brayton Purcell Llp
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 20, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Kaiser Gypsum Co., Inc.¿s motion to disqualify Brayton Purcell LLP: hearing required. The hearing will be at 11:15am, not 9:30am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
